title: ophrys lutea var. minor
intro: Ophrys lutea var. minor, also known as the lesser bee orchid, is a variety of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The lesser bee orchid is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
